title: RUSTINS ASAPAG250 ASAP Paint Grey 250ml
features: Quick-Drying Formula: Rustins ASAP paint is formulated for fast drying, allowing you to complete your painting projects in less time.
Versatile Application: Suitable for a variety of surfaces, including wood, metal, and more, making it a versatile choice for your painting needs.
Easy to Use: With its user-friendly application, this paint is perfect for both DIY enthusiasts and professionals, ensuring a hassle-free painting experience.
Low Odor Formula: The low odor formula of Rustins ASAP paint makes it ideal for indoor projects, ensuring a pleasant painting experience without strong fumes.
Environmentally Friendly: This paint is formulated with consideration for the environment, providing you with a responsible and eco-friendly choice for your painting needs.
description: From the manufacturer Quick Dry All Surface All Purpose Paint (ASAP) A water-based paint that dries to a satin finish. It resists flaking or peeling because of its flexible capabilities. Can be used indoors and outdoors on multiple surfaces. It is touch dry in 30 minutes and re-coating time is approximately 2-3 hours. 1 litre covers approximately 12-14 square metres in 1 coat. Available in 8 colours: Black, White, Cream, Red, Blue, Green, Grey and Light Grey. Sizes 250ml, 500ml & 1 litre. Also available in 50ml in Satin White, Black and Grey.
